title: Ubiquiti SR71-15 miniPCI, 500 mW, 802.11a/n, 5Ghz, 2xMMCX
description: UBNT SR71-15 mini PCI card with excellent sensitivity 97dBm with output power 500mW. This card belongs to the proven very powerful line of SuperRange cards. Its advantages are a high range of operating temperatures and very high sensitivity. This card allows you to make connections up to a distance of 50 km
specsSearch: Wireless features Sensitivity [dBm] 97 Wireless frequency 5 GHz WiFi standards 802.11n, 802.11a Transmission speed - 5GHz [Mb/s] 300 Tx power 5GHz [dBm] 27 Security WPA, WPA2, AES-CCM & TKIP Encryption, 802.1x, 64/128/152bit WEP Connectors and Interfaces Bus type miniPCI RF connectors (2) MMCX Power Max. power consumption [W] 4,3 Physical characteristics Operating temperature [°C] 40 up to 85 Width [mm] 60 Height [mm] 7 Depth [mm] 55
